ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the airline operating the flight */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source airport of the flight */,
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the destination airport of the flight */,
  "total_stops" INTEGER /* Total number of stops in the flight */,
  "journey_month" INTEGER /* Month of the flight journey */,
  "journey_day" INTEGER /* Day of the flight journey */,
  "arrival_hour" INTEGER /* Hour of arrival */,
  "arrival_min" INTEGER /* Minute of arrival */,
  "departure_hour" INTEGER /* Hour of departure */,
  "departure_min" INTEGER /* Minute of departure */,
  "duration_min" INTEGER /* Total duration of the flight in minutes */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the flight within the airline */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the aircraft used for the flight */,
  "scheduled_departure" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time */,
  "scheduled_arrival" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time */,
  "actual_departure" TEXT /* Actual departure time */,
  "actual_arrival" TEXT /* Actual arrival time */,
  "gate_number" TEXT /* Gate number at the airport */,
  "terminal" TEXT /* Terminal number at the airport */,
  "flight_class" TEXT /* Class of the flight (e.g., economy, business) */,
  "fare" TEXT /* Fare for the flight */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the aircraft */,
  "booked_seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats booked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight (e.g., on-time, delayed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_destination_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airlines" (
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airline */,
  "airline_name" TEXT /* Name of the airline */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the airline */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the airline */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the airline was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the airline */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the airline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code of the airport */,
  "icao_code" TEXT /* ICAO code of the airport */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the airport */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the airport */,
  "elevation" TEXT /* Elevation of the airport in meters */,
  "timezone_offset" TEXT /* Timezone offset from UTC */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status event */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight being tracked */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date of the status update */,
  "status_time" TEXT /* Time of the status update */,
  "status_type" TEXT /* Type of status (e.g., on-time, delayed, cancelled) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status update */,
  "estimated_arrival" TEXT /* Estimated arrival time */,
  "estimated_departure" TEXT /* Estimated departure time */,
  "gate_change" TEXT /* Any changes in the gate number */,
  "terminal_change" TEXT /* Any changes in the terminal */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_status_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., flight operations manager, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the flight data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the flight data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Detailed action performed (e.g., view flight status, edit flight schedule) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)
